title: Leaves From Satan's Book
writer: Edgar Høyer, Marie Corelli, Carl Theodor Dreyer
actors: Helge Nissen, Halvard Hoff, Jacob Texiere
plot: In 4 episodic tales of human suffering: the temptation of Jesus, the Spanish Inquisition, the French Revolution and the Russo-Finnish war of 1918, Satan attempts to win God's favor.
